name: studio.list_snapshots
description: List available snapshots (point-in-time backups) for an Actium Studio site.
whenToUse: Discovery step before studio.diff_versions: pick two snapshot ids to compare.
Pre-restore audit: confirm the target snapshot exists and inspect its metadata (date, kind).
Storage audit: enumerate snapshots older than X to identify cleanup candidates.
whenNotToUse: Caller already has the snapshot_id — skip listing; use it directly.
Caller needs the contents of a snapshot — use a snapshot-content skill (not this lister).
Caller wants to create a backup — use studio.create_snapshot; this skill only reads.
